result.status_detail: wrtn.ai session is logged out. Header shows '무료로 회원가입' + filled '로그인' button; sidebar has no account/profile section. Cannot run warning test until re-authenticated.

notes: Wave1.0 regression #1204 (baseline SUCCESS at #1187 WrtnSocketIoHandler). Opened wrtn.ai, hard reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R). Auth check FAILED: page is in logged-out state. Header top-right shows '무료로 회원가입' (signup) link + dark filled '로그인' (login) button instead of a user avatar. Opened sidebar (hamburger) to double-confirm — sidebar shows only '관심톡' promotions and '채팅 목록' with a single stale '새로운 채팅 / 05월 11일' entry; NO account/profile/logout section present. The '장희' badge at top-right is the Chrome BROWSER profile button (browser toolbar, outside page content), NOT the wrtn in-page avatar that was present at baseline #1187. Per task spec (if 로그인 -> FAIL_AUTH), did NOT proceed to type/submit the PII prompt. Re-login on test PC required before warning regression can be re-run. URL=wrtn.ai.
